content: react-markdown latest is v10.1.0 (npm registry, verified 2026-07-03); peerDeps react >=18 — compatible with tide dashboard's React 18.3.1. v10 removed the className prop (wrap in your own element). Pair with remark-gfm v4.0.1 for tables/tasklists/strikethrough. Style via @tailwindcss/typography prose classes, registered in Tailwind v4 with @plugin "@tailwindcss/typography" in CSS (no config file). react-markdown renders to React elements without dangerouslySetInnerHTML — XSS-safe for LLM-authored markdown; do not add rehype-raw.
